examples.title: SLL Node Class
examples.description: Basic node implementation for singly linked list
examples.explanation: Each node stores data and reference to next node

examples.title: Linked List Reversal
examples.description: Algorithm to reverse a singly linked list
examples.code:
FUNCTION reverseList(head):
    prev = NULL
    current = head
    WHILE current != NULL:
        next = current.next
        current.next = prev
        prev = current
        current = next
    RETURN prev
examples.explanation: Uses three pointers to reverse links iteratively
